compiled_state.title: Fix pre-existing EXPECTED_CATEGORIES drift for approach_evaluation and test_quality_review
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
Testing mode: UPDATE. TDD exemption: Unit exemption criterion #2 (change-detector).
File: tests/scripts/test-agent-routing-conf.sh.

Add approach_evaluation and test_quality_review to EXPECTED_CATEGORIES array.

Both entries have existed in config/agent-routing.conf since prior sprints (confirmed at lines 57-58 of current conf file). No new behavioral implementation is introduced. The conf implementations pre-date this assertion -- the test will immediately pass GREEN because the conf already satisfies these assertions. This is a pure test-hygiene fix closing the gap where EXPECTED_CATEGORIES failed to keep pace with conf additions.

Note: design_creation was handled in Task 08a3-cae0 where it has a proper RED phase via test_ui_designer_routing_entry.

Change: Append approach_evaluation and test_quality_review to EXPECTED_CATEGORIES array in tests/scripts/test-agent-routing-conf.sh (array expands from 9 to 11 entries after Task 08a3-cae0 added design_creation).

Acceptance criteria:
1. approach_evaluation present in EXPECTED_CATEGORIES
2. test_quality_review present in EXPECTED_CATEGORIES
3. bash tests/scripts/test-agent-routing-conf.sh exits 0
4. Universal: bash tests/scripts/run-script-tests.sh exits 0

Verify:
  bash tests/scripts/test-agent-routing-conf.sh && echo PASS
